source.name: Predict: Lists for Sprites
source.instructions: How might a list make it easier to manage 5 jellyfish instead of 5 separate variables? What would change about the draw() and update() functions?
source.command: python3 .guides/secure/freetext.py --question 'How might a list make it easier to manage 5 jellyfish instead of 5 separate variables? What would change about draw() and update()?' --use-llm
source.learningObjectives: I can predict how lists reduce repeated code when managing multiple sprites.
source.guidance: A strong answer mentions using a for loop to draw or check collisions for all items in a list, instead of writing separate lines for each variable.
